features: ✅ COMFORT SHAVING HEADS: The electric shaving heads with upgrade double layer premium fine steel blades, remove your beard gently, painlessly and more clean, round head design perfectly protect your skin from scratching.

✅ DUAL BLADE PRECISION CUTTING SYSTEM: First Blade Lifts, Second Blade Cuts for a Comfortable Close Shave. The shaver has ultra thin heads with slots to shave long hairs and holes to shave the shortest stubble.
✅ WASHABLE AND EASY TO CLEAN: For super convenient care and maintenance, the HQ8 replacement heads are fully washable. After use, simply hold the shaver under running water to clean.
✅ NOTE: This is NOT Original shaver head, but perfect replacement for your damaged shaver head. Replacement Heads Only, include 3 Shaver Heads.
description: Product description Precision Cutting System: Precision shaving system designed with slots and holes to quickly and comfortably shave both short stubble and longer hairs. Comfort Shaving Heads: The skin friendly profile of these shaving heads enables smooth skin contact for a comfortable shave. Washable and Easy to Clean: For super convenient care and maintenance, the HQ8 replacement heads are fully washable. After use, simply hold the shaver under running water to clean. Compatible with Models: HQ8445 HQ8825 HQ8830 HQ8845 HQ8850 HQ8865 HQ8870 HQ8875 HQ8880 HQ8885 HQ8894 HQ8890 HQ8140 HQ8155 HQ8160 HQ8170 HQ8240 HQ8260 HQ8270 HQ7120 HQ7140 HQ7160 HQ7180 HQ7290 HQ7240 HQ7320 HQ7340 HQ7360 HQ7380 HQ7390 HQ7310 HQ7100 HQ720 HQ6075 HQ6090 HQ6095 HQ6070 HQ6071 HQ6073 HQ6080 HQ5705 HQ5710 HQ5715 HQ9070 HQ9080 HQ9090 HQ9190 HQ9160 HQ9170 PT710 PT715 PT720 PT725 PT730 PT735 PT860 PT870 PT830 PT875 PT880 PT810 PT815 AT810 AT811 AT830 AT880 AT890 AT899 AT750 AT751 For optimal Lift & Cut performance, we highly recommend to replace your shaver blades every 12 months Here are the steps for replacing the shaving heads: 1. Open the shaver by pressing the "release" button; 2. Remove the retaining rings by turning them counterclockwise; 3. Take out the old shaving heads and carefully insert replacements; check that the heads align exactly in the setting; 4. Replace the retaining rings and secure them by turning the lock clockwise; 5. When you close the shaving head properly, you will hear it click into place. The package contents include: 3 x HQ8 Replacement Head NOTE This not NOT original shaver head, but fit the aboves shaver model. Please contact us if your shaver is not in the product list. Directions Follow these steps to replace shaving heads: 1. Open the shaver by pressing the 'release' button; 2. Remove the retaining rings by turning them counterclockwise; 3. Take out the old shaving heads and carefully insert the spares; check that the heads line up exactly in the setting; 4. Replace the retaining rings and secure them by turning the lock clockwise. Safety Warning For safe operation, keep the shaver away from water, avoid submerging it completely, and replace the shaver blades every 12 months for optimal performance. See more
